Once Upon A Time

A little flower + A teddy bear

Some friendships don't happen. They find each other.

Our Story

The timeline of us

The first hello

Where it all began

Two very different souls accidentally bumped into each other.

Late night talks

Words became worlds

Somehow we never ran out of things to say.

The chaos and the calm

We became home

One of us was a storm. The other, the shelter.

Every little moment

Small things, big meanings

Laughs, rants, silences — all of it mattered.

The Beautiful Chaos

Two puzzle pieces that somehow fit

🌼

The Chaotic Flower

  • Funny

    Laughs at my own jokes

  • Loud

    Forgets what an inside voice is

  • Overthinks

    Makes a movie out of a text

  • Creates problems

    Then asks for help solving them

🐻

The Calm Bear

  • Patient

    Listens to the same story twice

  • Calm

    The eye of every storm

  • Protective

    Fights dragons in silence

  • Safe place

    Where the world feels soft

Together, we somehow make perfect sense.

Our Memories

Little frames of forever

The Day Everything Changed

When the forest went quiet

Not every silence is peaceful.

Some silences echo with words we wish we could take back.

I made mistakes.

And in making them, I forgot that the safest place in my world was you.

The Letter

I don't say this enough, but you are the best thing this chaotic flower ever found.

I'm sorry for the moments I was too much and the moments I wasn't enough.

Sorry for the words I shouldn't have said, and the ones I should have said louder.

You stayed when I was difficult. You listened when I was loud. You loved me anyway.

I don't deserve you, but I'm grateful every day that our paths found each other.

If you let me, I promise to keep growing — not perfectly, but honestly.

Your annoying flower 🌼

Reasons I Treasure You

Thank you for...

Thank you for

Listening

tap to reveal

To my stories, my rants, and my silence.

Thank you for

Understanding

tap to reveal

Even when I don't understand myself.

Thank you for

Staying

tap to reveal

When walking away would have been easier.

Thank you for

Believing

tap to reveal

In the person I am still learning to be.

Thank you for

Forgiving

tap to reveal

Even before I asked for it.

Thank you for

Supporting

tap to reveal

Quietly, fiercely, unconditionally.

Future

This isn't the end of our book

There are still so many sunsets we haven't watched.

So many jokes we haven't laughed at.

So many memories we haven't made.

Don't let our story end here.

Home was never a place. It somehow became you.

Can we keep writing our story?
